calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF SOPHIA LENG IS PRESENT.
SUNNY SARKIS FOR APPELLANT'S/DEFENDANT'S ERNESTO VIZUET & ANGELICA CORPORATION ARE PRESENT.

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. ALL PARTIES AND WITNESSES ARE SWORN.

SOPHIA LENG, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF, TESTIFIES ON HER OWN BEHALF.

THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:

EXHIBIT 1 - SIXTEEN-PAGE STAPLED COPY OF CERTIFIED MAIL,SECRETARY OF STATE STATEMENT OF INFORMATION, COPY OF CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE, DIAGRAM OF COLLISION, THREE PAGES OF COLOR PHOTOS, COPY OF 911 CALL, COLOR PHOTO OF DRIVER'S LICENSE, TWO COLOR PHOTOS OF TRUCK, FOUR COLOR PHOTOS OF VEHICLE DAMAGE, ONE COLOR PHOTO OF VEHICLE RIM
EXHIBIT 2 - TWO-PAGED STAPLED COPY OF NOTICE OF APPELLANT'S APPEAL, ONE COPY OF CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE
EXHIBIT 3 - SEVEN PAGE STAPLED COPY OF THREE DIFFERENT AUTO REPAIR SHOP ESTIMATES FOR CAR REPAIR
EXHIBIT 4 - EIGHT PAGE COLOR PHOTOS STAPLED COPY OF COMPARABLE VEHICLE VALUE FOR MAZDA MIATA

ERNESTO VIZUET & ANGELICA CORPORATION, APPELLANT'S/DEFENDANT'S TESTIFIES ON HIS OWN BEHALF AND ON BEHALF OF ANGELICA CORPORATION.

THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:

EXHIBIT A - COLOR PHOTO OF STREET & INTERSECTION

EXHIBIT B - DIAGRAM OF COLLISION

EXHIBIT C - COLOR PHOTO OF STREET CORNER & CROSSWALK

EXHIBIT D - COLOR PHOTO OF RED MAZDA MIATA

EXHIBIT E - FOUR PAGE STAPLED COPY OF CARFAX REPORT

EXHIBIT F - COPY OF LIST OF NATIONWIDE SALES FOR MAZDA MIATA

AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

JPT Roger R. Rubin, CLERK G. FELICIANO, NOT REPORTED (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Judgment Entered
